---
title: Degenerate Art
author: Andrea Pitzer
image: https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c7868b27-b30f-442c-9dc7-97e77836a26c/DAartworktriptych.png
image-alt: Paintings from the Atalanta & Clytemnestra series by Andrea Pitzer (oil on canvas or birch)
---


![](https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c7868b27-b30f-442c-9dc7-97e77836a26c/DAartworktriptych.png)



<https://degenerateart.beehiiv.com/>
